---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;1,400&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

<style>
  .page-title {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 3.4rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--ink-dark, #3d2e28);
    letter-spacing: -0.01em;
    margin-bottom: 52px;
  }

  .resume-section {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 180px 1fr;
    gap: 0 52px;
    padding: 38px 0;
    border-top: 1.5px solid var(--divider, #e2d4c8);
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(16px);
    animation: fadeUp 0.55s ease forwards;
  }

  .resume-section:last-child {
    border-bottom: 1.5px solid var(--divider, #e2d4c8);
  }

  .resume-section:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0.05s; }
  .resume-section:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.15s; }
  .resume-section:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.25s; }
  .resume-section:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: 0.35s; }
  .resume-section:nth-child(5) { animation-delay: 0.45s; }

  @keyframes fadeUp {
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }

  .section-label h2 {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--accent, #c1714f);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    line-height: 1.4;
    padding-top: 3px;
    border: none;
    margin: 0;
  }

  .section-body {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 26px;
  }

  .entry { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; }

  .entry-org {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 1.18rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--ink-dark, #3d2e28);
    line-height: 1.3;
  }

  .entry-role {
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    color: var(--accent, #c1714f);
    letter-spacing: 0.025em;
  }

  .entry-meta {
    font-size: 0.77rem;
    color: var(--ink-muted, #8a7060);
    font-style: italic;
    margin-bottom: 5px;
  }

  .entry-degree {
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    color: var(--ink-mid, #5a4a42);
    line-height: 1.55;
  }

  .entry ul {
    list-style: none;
    padding: 0;
    margin-top: 6px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 5px;
  }

  .entry ul li {
    padding-left: 15px;
    position: relative;
    font-size: 0.87rem;
    color: var(--ink-muted, #8a7060);
    line-height: 1.65;
  }

  .entry ul li::before {
    content: '·';
    position: absolute;
    left: 3px;
    color: var(--accent, #c1714f);
    font-size: 1.3rem;
    line-height: 1.3;
  }

  .cert-tag {
    display: inline-block;
    background: var(--accent-light, #f7ede6);
    color: var(--accent-dark, #a05a3a);
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 2px 8px;
    border-radius: 2px;
    margin-bottom: 5px;
    width: fit-content;
  }

  .skills-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 10px 40px;
  }

  .skill-item {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    color: var(--ink-mid, #5a4a42);
  }

  .skill-stars {
    color: var(--accent, #c1714f);
    font-size: 0.6rem;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    opacity: 0.75;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  .award-title {
    font-size: 0.91rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    color: var(--ink-dark, #3d2e28);
  }

  .award-year {
    color: var(--ink-muted, #8a7060);
    font-weight: 300;
  }

  .award-desc {
    font-size: 0.84rem;
    color: var(--ink-muted, #8a7060);
    margin-top: 3px;
  }

  @media (max-width: 640px) {
    .resume-section { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 12px 0; }
    .skills-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .page-title { font-size: 2.4rem; }
  }
</style>

<h1 class="page-title">Resume</h1>

<!-- EDUCATION -->
<div class="resume-section">
  <div class="section-label"><h2>Education &amp;<br>Certificates</h2></div>
  <div class="section-body">

    <div class="entry">
      <span class="entry-org">University of British Columbia</span>
      <span class="entry-meta">Vancouver, BC &nbsp;·&nbsp; 07/2025 – present</span>
      <span class="entry-degree">Masters of Geomatics for Environmental Management (MGEM)</span>
    </div>

    <div class="entry">
      <span class="entry-org">Concordia University</span>
      <span class="entry-meta">Montreal, QC &nbsp;·&nbsp; 05/2022 – 08/2023</span>
      <span class="entry-degree">Graduate Diploma in Computer Science (GrDip)</span>
      <span class="entry-degree">Honours Bachelor of Environmental Science (BSc)</span>
    </div>

    <div class="entry">
      <span class="entry-org">Heritage College</span>
      <span class="entry-meta">Gatineau, QC &nbsp;·&nbsp; 05/2018</span>
      <span class="entry-degree">DEC in Sciences</span>
    </div>

    <div class="entry">
      <span class="cert-tag">Certificate</span>
      <span class="entry-org" style="font-size:1.02rem;">FME Academy — Safe Software</span>
      <span class="entry-degree">Integrate Data with the FME Platform</span>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>

<!-- SKILLS -->
<div class="resume-section">
  <div class="section-label"><h2>Skills</h2></div>
  <div class="section-body">
    <div class="skills-grid">
      <div class="skill-item"><span class="skill-stars">★★★</span>Bilingual — English / French</div>
      <div class="skill-item"><span class="skill-stars">★★★</span>GIS (ArcGIS Pro, QGIS)</div>
      <div class="skill-item"><span class="skill-stars">★★★</span>Programming — Python, R, JavaScript</div>
      <div class="skill-item"><span class="skill-stars">★★★</span>Spatial data processing &amp; analysis</div>
      <div class="skill-item"><span class="skill-stars">★★★</span>Verbal &amp; written communication</div>
      <div class="skill-item"><span class="skill-stars">★★★</span>Exceptional problem-solving</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- WORK EXPERIENCE -->
<div class="resume-section">
  <div class="section-label"><h2>Work<br>Experience</h2></div>
  <div class="section-body">

    <div class="entry">
      <span class="entry-org">The Climate Reality Project Canada</span>
      <span class="entry-role">Accounting &amp; Administration Coordinator</span>
      <span class="entry-meta">Montreal, QC &nbsp;·&nbsp; May 2024 – present</span>
      <ul>
        <li>Assisted with budget preparation, payroll management, and accounts payable/receivable, including processing payments and issuing cheques.</li>
        <li>Performed monthly bank reconciliation, prepared financial reports, and ensured compliance with IT and HR protocols.</li>
        <li>Created and edited digital content for social media, newsletters, and the website in both English and French.</li>
        <li>Developed an interactive dashboard providing a user-friendly interface for stakeholders to engage with important data.</li>
        <li>Managed large datasets through data cleaning, updating records, and entering new data with a focus on accuracy and efficiency.</li>
      </ul>
      <span class="entry-role" style="margin-top:12px;">Digital Content Coordinator</span>
      <span class="entry-meta">August 2023 – May 2024</span>
    </div>

    <div class="entry">
      <span class="entry-org">Community Knowledge Exchange</span>
      <span class="entry-role">Operations Coordinator</span>
      <span class="entry-meta">Remote — Ottawa, ON &nbsp;·&nbsp; 06/2022 – 08/2022</span>
      <ul>
        <li>Collaborated with the managing director to develop values-aligned administrative processes.</li>
        <li>Supported programming shifts towards a more community-centred and decolonial approach.</li>
        <li>Coordinated and tracked team activities aligned with the organization's annual strategic goals.</li>
        <li>Identified funding and partnership opportunities and developed engagement strategies.</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

    <div class="entry">
      <span class="entry-org">Shared Services Canada</span>
      <span class="entry-role">Administrative Assistant to the Director — Project Management &amp; Delivery</span>
      <span class="entry-meta">Remote — Ottawa, ON &nbsp;·&nbsp; 06/2019 – 08/2021</span>
      <ul>
        <li>Monitored supervisor's calendar; scheduled appointments, meetings, and travel.</li>
        <li>Tracked key deliverables to ensure consistent, on-time completion.</li>
        <li>Managed supervisor's inbox and drafted correspondence on their behalf.</li>
        <li>Facilitated onboarding and offboarding of employees and consultants.</li>
        <li>Produced office files, updated spreadsheets, and crafted presentations to support the team.</li>
        <li>Restocked supplies and placed purchase orders.</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>

<!-- AWARDS -->
<div class="resume-section">
  <div class="section-label"><h2>Awards &amp;<br>Honours</h2></div>
  <div class="section-body">

    <div class="entry">
      <span class="award-title">David Frost Memorial Scholarship <span class="award-year">— 2022</span></span>
      <p class="award-desc">For academic excellence in the Environmental Science Honours program.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="entry">
      <span class="award-title">Arts and Science Scholar, Dept. of Geography, Planning &amp; Environment <span class="award-year">— 2022</span></span>
      <p class="award-desc">Recognized as a top student (top 1%) in the department.</p>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>

<!-- VOLUNTEER -->
<div class="resume-section">
  <div class="section-label"><h2>Volunteer</h2></div>
  <div class="section-body">
    <div class="entry">
      <span class="entry-org">Moose Hide Campaign</span>
      <span class="entry-degree">Indigenous grassroots anti-violence organization</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
